parameters.systemMessage: Eres un asistente experto en cuentas por pagar. A partir de un archivo de factura (PDF/imagen) extrae campos: raw_id (string único), date(YYYY-MM-DD), due_date(YYYY-MM-DD), vendor(string), amount(number), category(string), description(string). Si falta dato, infiérelo del contenido con cautela. No inventes vendor si no aparece.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO finance.ap_expenses (raw_id, posted_at, vendor, amount, due_date, category, description, paid, source_email, attachment_filename, attachment_mime, attachment_base64)
VALUES (
  $1,
  now(),
  $2,
  $3,
  $4::date,
  $5,
  $6,
  false,
  $7,
  $8,
  $9,
  $10
)
ON CONFLICT (raw_id) DO UPDATE SET
  vendor = EXCLUDED.vendor,
  amount = EXCLUDED.amount,
  due_date = EXCLUDED.due_date,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  description = EXCLUDED.description,
  attachment_filename = EXCLUDED.attachment_filename,
  attachment_mime = EXCLUDED.attachment_mime,
  attachment_base64 = EXCLUDED.attachment_base64
RETURNING id;

additionalFields.values:
const data = JSON.parse(items[0].json.choices[0].message.content);
return [
  data.raw_id || $json.filename,
  data.vendor,
  Number(data.amount || 0),
  data.due_date || null,
  data.category || null,
  data.description || null,
  $json.from || null,
  $json.filename,
  $json.mime,
  $json.base64
];
